channel.title: Interactive Football Resources
channel.description: A collection of interactive football rules resources including PDF, article, Pinterest post, and GitHub repository.

item.title: Football Rules Explained Interactively (PDF)
item.description: This PDF guide helps you understand football rules clearly, covering throw-ins, red cards, extra time, and more. Perfect for beginners and football enthusiasts.

item.title: How to Learn Football Rules Interactively (Medium Article)
item.description: This article explains football rules interactively and links to the full PDF guide. Perfect for beginners who want to learn the rules step by step.

item.title: Football Rules Visual Guide (Pinterest)
item.description: A visual representation of football rules pinned on Pinterest. Great for quick reference and interactive learning.

item.title: Interactive Football Rules Project (GitHub)
item.description: Open-source GitHub repository for the interactive football rules project. Includes the PDF guide, code, and instructions for learning football rules interactively.
